name: BlackRock World Mining Trust plc
description: BlackRock World Mining Trust plc is a United Kingdom-based investment trust. The company's investment objective is to provide a diversified investment in mining and metal assets worldwide, actively managed to maximize total real return. It invests predominantly in mining and metal securities, but can also hold physical metals and royalty contracts. The trust offers exposure to diversified miners, copper, gold, steel, and other industrial metals, aiming to benefit from global commodity demand and the transition to green energy.
